title: Realm RPG: Fallen Adventurers
description: Improves world exploration by adding skeletons wtih treasures. Vanilla style.
body:
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tu54PMAb/images/83aa3b019dd0a0269ad59dbb68a1f55d27d7d08e.png)
![Skeletons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tu54PMAb/images/7a12f3562d0bfc74f7d02ff96471f926e3cc1bce.png)

Welcome to Realm RPG - a medieval fantasy mod series!

### 📖 About
Fallen Adventurers is a mod that will greatly diversify Minecraft's adventure and exploration aspects by adding the skeletons of your less fortunate predecessors across the world, without going too far away from vanilla game balance & graphics style.

Available on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/realm-rpg-fallen-adventurers) & [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/realm-rpg-fallen-adventurers) | For Minecraft Java Edition ([Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/realm-rpg-fallen-adventurers/versions?l=forge) & [NeoForge](https://modrinth.com/mod/realm-rpg-fallen-adventurers/versions?l=neoforge)).

### 💀 Features  
- 50+ types of skeletons that generate in different biomes and dimensions (see [gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/realm-rpg-fallen-adventurers/gallery)).
- All skeletons drop various items like ores, materials, food, gear and enchanted books.
- Several skeletons have some unexpected surprises for you. Be prepared for everything.
- Rare underground chambers generate both in stone and deepslate caves.
- You can decorate your buildings and dungeons with skeletons (use Silk Touch).
- This mod is compatible with most biome & dimension mods by default.
- Special features for some skeletons in Twilight Forest, Aether and Undergarden dimensions.
- Skeleton loot tables and generation is easy to edit with a simple datapack.

### 💬 Permissions
✔️**You are allowed** to include this mod in [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/realm-rpg-fallen-adventurers) & [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/realm-rpg-fallen-adventurers) modpacks. Also feel free to use this mod in your videos (I would appreciate it if you leave a link to the mod page in the description).

❌**You are not allowed** to reupload this mod to any other websites/launchers/apps, use any contents of this mod (textures, models, recipes, tags, etc) in other projects, sell this mod in any way or include in paid modpacks - this mod is free for all players.
